principal.name: Y Ramanjaneyulu
principal.message:
Dear Parents, Students, and Visitors,

It gives me immense pleasure to welcome you to Friends Vidyanikethan High School, a place where learning is nurtured with care, discipline, and a commitment to excellence. Managed by Friends Educational Society, our school believes that education is not merely about academic achievement but about developing confident, responsible, and compassionate individuals who are prepared to meet the challenges of an ever-changing world.

At Friends Vidyanikethan, we strive to create a safe, inclusive, and inspiring learning environment where every child is encouraged to discover their unique talents and reach their full potential. Our dedicated team of teachers combines academic rigor with innovative teaching methods to ensure that students develop critical thinking, creativity, strong moral values, and lifelong learning skills.

We believe that the success of a child is built on the strong partnership between the school, parents, and the community. Together, we aim to provide an education that balances knowledge, character, discipline, and service to society.

As we embrace technology and modern educational practices, we remain firmly rooted in the values of integrity, respect, perseverance, and compassion. Our goal is to prepare students not only for examinations but also for life—equipping them to become responsible citizens and future leaders.

I invite you to explore our website and learn more about our academic programs, facilities, and the opportunities we provide for every student. We look forward to welcoming you to the Friends Vidyanikethan family and working together to shape a bright and successful future for our children.

"Education is the foundation upon which dreams are built, character is formed, and futures are created."

contact.officeHours: 9.00 AM to 4.30 PM Monday to Saturday
